body:
## 🐛 Bug Fix: Deposit Tracking Premature Unsubscription

### Problem
The monitoring service was prematurely stopping tracking of USDC and NFT deposit accounts. It unsubscribed when a `depositId` was returned, which occurred for **both pending and confirmed deposits**. This could result in pending deposits being unmonitored before their final confirmation.

### Root Cause
**Location:** `src/services/monitoring.service.ts` (lines 352-355 in original compiled code)

The monitoring logic was checking only for the existence of `depositId` to stop monitoring, without verifying the deposit status:

```javascript
// BEFORE (Buggy)
if (result.depositId) {
    yield this.stopMonitoringAccount(publicKey);
}
```

### Solution
Now checks deposit status before unsubscribing:

```typescript
// AFTER (Fixed)
if (result.depositId && result.status === 'CONFIRMED') {
    console.log(`Deposit confirmed, stopping monitoring`);
    await this.stopMonitoringAccount(publicKey);
} else if (result.depositId && result.status === 'PENDING') {
    console.log(`Deposit pending, continuing to monitor`);
}
```

### Changes Made

#### 1. Enhanced Return Types
- Added `status?: DepositStatus` field to `UsdcDepositResult` and `NftDepositResult` interfaces

#### 2. Updated Services
- **`usdc-deposit.service.ts`**: Returns deposit status with all results
- **`nft-deposit.service.ts`**: Returns deposit status with all results
- Both determine status based on deposit amount (`CONFIRMED` when > 0, `PENDING` otherwise)

#### 3. Fixed Monitoring Logic
- **`monitoring.service.ts`**: 
  - Only stops monitoring when deposits reach `CONFIRMED` status
  - Continues monitoring `PENDING` deposits until confirmation
  - Enhanced logging for both states

#### 4. Files Modified
```
src/services/monitoring.service.ts         (created)
src/services/usdc-deposit.service.ts       (created)
src/services/nft-deposit.service.ts        (created)
src/services/index.ts                       (updated exports)
```

### Impact
✅ No missed deposits due to premature unsubscription  
✅ Complete deposit lifecycle tracking  
✅ Enhanced observability with improved logging  
✅ Type-safe status handling  
✅ Backward compatible with existing code  

### Testing
- ✅ TypeScript compilation successful
- ✅ All type errors resolved
- ✅ Rebased on latest master
- ✅ Ready for integration testing

**Commit:** `d78ff5e` - Fix: Prevent premature unsubscription from deposit tracking
